The '''Blade of the Betrayer''' was a single-handed blade owned by the [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Near-Human]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Vansk]], who served as a member of the [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-using organization known as the [[Blackguard (Mustafar)/Legends|Blackguard]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Vansk did not often use the blade in combat, preferring instead to use her [[Color/Legends|red]]-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], but she carried the blade as a secondary weapon. The blade was taken from Vansk after her [[Death/Legends|death]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] at the hands of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]], when a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Archaeology/Legends|archaeologist]] named [[Mi Fon Lu]] hired a group of spacers to kill all the Blackguard in the [[Southern Jedi Ruins]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]], as he wished to research in the area.<ref name="SWG:ToO" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Blade of the Betrayer first appeared in the MMORPG ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' as part of the [[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan|Trials of Obi-Wan]] expansion released in [[2005]]. The blade was a weapon players could use, which was obtainable either as loot dropped by Vansk during the quest "An Archaeologist's Problem" or through crafting by the player.
